## 📐 Architectural Alignment Check
- [ ] Code follows the established pattern for this repository (FastAPI Flat, Go Clean Arch, or .NET CQRS).
- [ ] No hardcoded configuration strings or secrets (verified environment properties / Vault injection points).
- [ ] Cross-cutting structural concerns (CORS, Global Error Contracts) align with the SHP Gateway guidelines.

## 🧪 Quality Assurance & Automation Matrix
### 1. Manual Testing Verified
- [ ] Local endpoint verification successful via Postman/cURL.
- [ ] Logs audited for proper error contract structures and tracking traces.

### 2. Automated Test Coverage
- [ ] Component unit tests executed locally and passing cleanly.
- [ ] BDD Cucumber / Cypress regression suites evaluated against code changes.
